_meta.description: A light-weight and powerful meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system for Claude Code

user_decision: INSPIRATION ONLY — extract patterns, ship nothing direct from gsd. Confirmed via AskUserQuestion at planning time.

EXPLICITLY_DO_NOT_BORROW.reason: AA-MA uses [task]-plan.md; ROADMAP language fragments lexicon
AA-MA uses Milestone M1, M2; mixing phase/milestone language confuses execution
AA-MA has 1 plan per task/branch; gsd has 1 PLAN per phase
AA-MA uses provenance.log; renaming would fragment customer expectations
AA-MA has aa-ma-scribe, aa-ma-validator; importing gsd agent names creates registry collision
Direct terminology collision with aa-ma-forge's /aa-ma-plan (which was renamed FROM /ultraplan in 2026-04 because Anthropic shipped a built-in 'ultraplan' — we've already navigated this naming once)
